data.name: AngelShot - Chapter 1
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to labsense, where science and the sensual come to life!

We are excited to share our findings with you and help you find the perfect product to suit your needs.

When the security bots in the lab go haywire it's up to you to zap your way through the rooms to ascend the levels and save the day!

Gameplay

AngelShot: Chapter 1 is a randomly generated top down shooter roguelike. Utilise the items in toolboxes to gain strength, speed and countless other effects as you brave the rooms constantly ramping in difficulty.

Key features:

  • Lovingly handcrafted pixel graphics and character art

  • Challenging looping gameplay

  • Fully voiced dialogue system

  • Original dynamic music

  • Endless mode

  • Toggleable NSFW scenes

  • Gallery mode

data.short_description: Zip zap your way through this top down shooter roguelike! Shoot your way through hordes of enemies, power up and save the lab!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: OS: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 顯示卡: (Integrated): Intel HD Graphics or AMD (formerly ATI) Radeon HD Graphics (Discrete): Nvidia GeForce 9600 GT or AMD Radeon HD 2400
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 80 MB 可用空間
